title: Update on Zimbabwe: Lifting sanctions on 4 individuals and 1 entity
body: "The UK announces the delisting of sanctions against individuals Owen Ncube, Isaac Moyo, Godwin Matanga, Anselem Sanyatwe, and the entity Zimbabwe Defence Industries (ZDI).   The revocations follow a similar move from the European Union in February 2025, when they delisted their last remaining entity (ZDI) whilst renewing their existing Zimbabwe sanctions framework. The US also removed a number of designations in March 2024.   Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
